title: SSH Misconfigured
hints: Check if sshd is running: pgrep sshd — and test the config: /usr/sbin/sshd -t
Read the config file: cat /etc/ssh/sshd_config — look at Port and PasswordAuthentication
Fix password auth: sed -i 's/^PasswordAuthentication no/PasswordAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
Start sshd: /usr/sbin/sshd — then confirm: ss -tlnp | grep :22
